message:
feat(observability): add deadline/checkpoint metrics + refactor OTel test harness

otel.rs:
- Add 5 new metric names to test expectations: deadline_warnings,
  deadline_violations, deadline_remaining_seconds,
  checkpoint_interval_seconds, task_stuck_detected
- These metrics support the new Deadline Monitoring dashboard

tests/otel_metrics.rs:
- Refactor to use local init_test_logging() instead of global setup
- Create counters/gauges/histograms via Metrics::new() registry
  rather than direct constructors, aligning with production usage
- Remove unused StdoutExporter import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
